creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon May 26 15:34:31 2014
New Revision: 355390
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355390
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355390/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/190252
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/databases/p5-Iterator-DBI/Makefile

Modified: head/databases/p5-Iterator-DBI/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/p5-Iterator-DBI/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:27 2014	(r355389)
+++ head/databases/p5-Iterator-DBI/Makefile	Mon May 26 15:34:31 2014	(r355390)
@@ -7,8 +7,11 @@ CATEGORIES=	databases perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	An iterator for returning DBI query results
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Iterator for returning DBI query results
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Iterator>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Iterator
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
